title: Sports Day Awards 运动会颁奖
scene: 运动会结束后，Teacher给获胜的同学颁发奖牌。

lines.en: Everyone, please gather around for the awards.
lines.zh: 大家请过来集合，颁奖仪式开始了。

lines.en: Ben, you came in first! Come up here.
Me? Really? I can not believe it!
You ran so fast. Here is your gold medal.
lines.zh: 你跑得非常快。这是你的金牌。

lines.en: Thank you so much! I practiced every day.
lines.zh: 太感谢了！我每天都练习。

lines.en: Your hard work paid off. We are all proud of you.
lines.zh: 你的努力有了回报。我们都为你骄傲。

lines.en: Can I thank my mom? She cheered for me today.
lines.zh: 我能谢谢我妈妈吗？她今天给我加油了。

lines.en: Of course. And congratulations to all the winners!
lines.zh: 当然可以。恭喜所有获奖的同学！

lines.en: This is the best day ever!
